positive: A stylized, minimalist celestial forest scene. Depict a grouping of glowing, bioluminescent trees and abstract floating islands in a deep space setting. The trees have intricate, organic silhouettes resembling stylized ferns and coral formations. The atmosphere should feature soft nebulae swirls (indigo, teal, and deep violet) contrasting with sharply defined, glowing white and gold elements. The composition must be centrally focused, featuring the main canopy group in the upper two-thirds. Use strong graphic contrast, highly clean linework, and a vibrant, ethereal palette suitable for printing on apparel. Style: Modern psychedelic illustration meets Art Nouveau geometry. Composition: Symmetrical, balanced, and visually impactful.
negative: blur, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, logo, trademark, poor anatomy, bad hands, jpeg artifacts, noise, extra limbs, low resolution, messy lines
